2605.11042.title: Towards Model-Free Learning in Dynamic Population Games: An Application to Karma Economies
2605.11042.paper_summary: Dynamic Population Games (DPGs) provide a tractable framework for modeling strategic interactions in large populations of self-interested agents, and have been successfully applied to the design of Karma economies, a class of fair non-monetary resource allocation mechanisms. Despite their appealing theoretical properties, existing computational tools for DPGs assume full knowledge of the game model and operate in a centralized fashion, limiting their applicability in realistic settings where agents have access only to their own private experience. This paper takes a step towards addressing this gap by studying model-free equilibrium learning in Karma DPGs. First, we analyze the setting in which a novel agent joins a Karma DPG already at its Stationary Nash Equilibrium (SNE) and learns a policy via Deep Q-Networks (DQN) without knowledge of the game model. Leveraging recent convergence results for DQN, we establish a suboptimality bound consisting of a DQN approximation error of order $O(1/\sqrt{N_s})$ and a mean field perturbation error of order $O(1/N)$, where $N_s$ is the replay buffer size and $N$ is the population size. Second, we consider the challenging problem of learning the SNE from scratch. We show empirically that combining deep RL with fictitious play and smoothed policy iteration allows agents to converge, in a model-free fashion, to a configuration close to the centrally computed SNE. Together, these contributions support the vision of Karma economies as practical tools for fair resource allocation.
2605.11042.paper_summary_zh: 動態人口遊戲（DPGs）提供了一個可行的框架，用於建模在自利代理的大型群體中的策略互動，並已成功應用於Karma經濟的設計，這是一類公平的非貨幣資源分配機制。儘管它們具有吸引人的理論特性，但現有的DPGs計算工具假設對遊戲模型有充分的了解，並以集中式方式運作，這限制了它們在現實環境中的適用性，因為代理僅能訪問自己的私人經驗。本文朝著填補這一空白邁出了一步，研究了Karma DPGs中的無模型均衡學習。首先，我們分析了一個新代理加入已達到穩態納什均衡（SNE）的Karma DPG的情境，並通過深度Q網絡（DQN）學習策略，而不需要了解遊戲模型。利用最近的DQN收斂結果，我們建立了一個次優性界限，包括一個DQN近似誤差的階數為$O(1/\sqrt{N_s})$和一個均場擾動誤差的階數為$O(1/N)$，其中$N_s$是重放緩衝區大小，$N$是人口大小。其次，我們考慮從零開始學習SNE的挑戰性問題。我們實證顯示，將深度強化學習與虛擬遊戲和光滑策略迭代相結合，允許代理以無模型的方式收斂到接近集中計算的SNE的配置。這些貢獻共同支持了Karma經濟作為公平資源分配實用工具的願景。
2605.11042.author: Matteo Cederle et.al.
2605.11042.authors: Matteo Cederle, Saverio Bolognani, Gian Antonio Susto
